mapper.select: SELECT ci.car_id, ci.image_urls, ci.daily_rent, cm.brand_name, cm.category, cm.energy_type, cm.displacement, cm.seat_count, cm.gearbox_type FROM car_info ci INNER JOIN `order` o ON ci.car_id = o.car_id LEFT JOIN car_models cm ON ci.model_id = cm.model_id WHERE o.status IN ('completed', 'success') GROUP BY ci.car_id, ci.image_urls, ci.daily_rent, cm.brand_name, cm.category, cm.energy_type, cm.displacement, cm.seat_count, cm.gearbox_type ORDER BY COUNT(o.id) DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT ci.car_id, ci.image_urls, ci.daily_rent, cm.brand_name, cm.category, cm.energy_type, cm.displacement, cm.seat_count, cm.gearbox_type FROM car_info ci LEFT JOIN car_models cm ON ci.model_id = cm.model_id WHERE ci.status = 'available' ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 10

SELECT ci.car_id, ci.image_urls, ci.daily_rent, cm.brand_name, cm.category, cm.energy_type, cm.displacement, cm.seat_count, cm.gearbox_type FROM car_info ci LEFT JOIN car_models cm ON ci.model_id = cm.model_id WHERE ci.status = 'available' ORDER BY ci.create_time DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT ci.car_id AS carId, ci.plate_number AS plateNumber, cm.brand_name AS brandName, cm.model_name AS modelName, ci.daily_rent AS dailyRent, COUNT(o.id) AS orderCount FROM car_info ci LEFT JOIN car_models cm ON ci.model_id = cm.model_id INNER JOIN `order` o ON o.car_id = ci.car_id WHERE o.status = '已完成' GROUP BY ci.car_id ORDER BY orderCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT CONCAT(cm.brand_name, ' ', cm.model_name) AS model, COUNT(o.id) AS rentalCount, COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) AS totalRevenue, COALESCE(AVG(ci.daily_rent), 0) AS avgDailyRent FROM car_models cm LEFT JOIN car_info ci ON ci.model_id = cm.model_id LEFT JOIN `order` o ON o.car_id = ci.car_id AND o.status = '已完成' GROUP BY cm.model_id ORDER BY rentalCount DESC

SELECT ci.car_id, cm.brand_name, ci.image_urls, cm.category, ci.daily_rent, cm.energy_type, cm.displacement, cm.seat_count, cm.gearbox_type FROM car_info ci LEFT JOIN car_models cm ON ci.model_id = cm.model_id WHERE ci.status = 'available'
AND ( ci.plate_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR cm.brand_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR cm.model_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY ci.create_time DESC

SELECT ci.car_id, ci.image_urls, cm.model_name, CONCAT(cm.brand_name, ' ', IFNULL(cm.category, ''), ' / ', cm.energy_type) AS subtitle, ci.daily_rent, ci.deposit_amount, cm.energy_type, cm.gearbox_type, cm.drive_mode, cm.seat_count, cm.displacement, ci.vehicle_color, ci.current_mileage FROM car_info ci LEFT JOIN car_models cm ON ci.model_id = cm.model_id WHERE ci.car_id = #{id}
